title: Configuration
description: Manage runtime settings. Saved changes take effect after the service restarts.

relay.label: Relay
relay.description: Paramètres de relais de service, clé API, rappel et relais IA sortant.

basic.label: Basic
basic.description: Runtime mode, port, API prefix, logging, and OpenAPI settings.

redis.label: Redis & locks
redis.description: Redis cluster, queue, cache, and distributed lock settings.

auth.label: Auth & security
auth.description: Login, token, API key, and security-related settings.

assets.label: File storage
assets.description: Object storage, upload, and asset processing settings.

ai.label: AI service
ai.description: AI providers, model runtime, draft generation, and server client settings.

agent.label: Agent
agent.description: Agent endpoint, model list, default models, and task timeout.

channels.label: Channels
channels.description: Social platform, short-link, relay, and publishing channel settings.
channels.relayConfiguredDescription: Relay est configuré. Il est généralement déconseillé de modifier les paramètres des canaux ; ajustez-les seulement pour contourner Relay ou vérifier les identifiants.

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.description: Additional configuration fields not matched to a standard group.

aiProviders.label: Model providers
aiProviders.description: Provider keys and base URLs for OpenAI, Volcengine, Grok, DashScope, Gemini, and Anthropic.

aiModels.label: Model catalog
aiModels.description: Chat, image, and video model capabilities, constraints, and defaults.

aiDraft.label: Draft generation
aiDraft.description: Models, aspect ratios, queue priority, and pricing for draft generation.

aiClient.label: Service clients
aiClient.description: Client settings between the Server service and AI service.

fieldDescriptions.environment: Select development or production runtime behavior.
fieldDescriptions.port: The port listened to by the current service.
fieldDescriptions.globalPrefix: Global API prefix used by backend routes.
fieldDescriptions.agent.models: Available model names for Agent tasks. The default models must be included here.
fieldDescriptions.agent.taskTimeoutMs: Maximum Agent task runtime in milliseconds.
fieldDescriptions.appDomain: Public domain used for callbacks, short links, or asset access.
fieldDescriptions.ai.models: AI model catalog for chat, image, and video capabilities.
fieldDescriptions.ai.draftGeneration: Model mapping and default runtime settings for AI draft generation.
fieldDescriptions.channel: OAuth, callback, logo, scopes, and platform-specific settings for each channel.
fieldDescriptions.assets: Object storage bucket, access keys, public URL, and upload limits.

messages.saveSuccess: Saved. Restart the service for changes to take effect.
messages.restartSuccess: Service is back online. Configuration is now effective.
messages.jsonHint: Le mode JSON est enregistré comme objet. Un JSON invalide ne sera pas envoyé.

errors.healthTimeoutDescription: The restart request was sent, but /health did not recover in time. Please check the service manually.
errors.jsonRootObject: La valeur racine doit être un objet JSON.
